occurrence_sentence: Charles Tahan Departs Government Roles, Says It Is 'Now Time to Reauthorize The NQI Act'

interaction_phrase: Director of the National Quantum Coordination Office
occurrence_sentence: Charles Tahan, Director of the National Quantum Coordination Office and assistant for Quantum Information Science at the White House Office of Science and Technology Policy, has announced his departure from government roles after a 15-year tenure, including his recent four years at the White House.

interaction_phrase: renewing the National Quantum Initiative Act
occurrence_sentence: In his latest Director's Letter, Tahan reflects on his journey in the quantum field, underscores the urgency of renewing the National Quantum Initiative Act (NQIA) stalled last year in Congress, and advocates for the importance of the National Q-12 Education program in cultivating a future quantum workforce.

interaction_phrase: Director of the National Quantum Coordination Office
occurrence_sentence: Charles Tahan, Director of the National Quantum Coordination Office and assistant for Quantum Information Science at the White House Office of Science and Technology Policy, has announced his departure from government roles after a 15-year tenure, including his recent four years at the White House.
It is now time to reauthorize the NQI Act.
The National Quantum Coordination Office (NQCO) did a few things to inform this process beyond our existing national strategy and annual reports.
The National Quantum Coordination Office (NQCO) did a few things to inform this process beyond our existing [national strategy and annual reports](https://www.quantum.gov/strategy/).

1. Reauthorize the National Science Foundation (NSF) and Department of Energy (DOE) quantum information science research and education centers and remove the limit on the number of centers authorized for these agencies.

1. Reauthorize the National Science Foundation (NSF) and Department of Energy (DOE) quantum information science research and education centers and remove the limit on the number of centers authorized for these agencies.

2. Support NSF programs to expand and broaden participation in quantum information science, including potential new mid-career development programs and bridge programs focused on preparing post-baccalaureate students for graduate programs in quantum information science and engineering.

interaction_phrase: Strengthen the whole-of-government approach to implementing the original National Quantum Initiative Act
occurrence_sentence: 3. Strengthen the whole-of-government approach to implementing the original National Quantum Initiative Act by expanding the authorized core agencies and providing new dedicated international funding to follow-up on U.S. commitments to international cooperation.

3. Strengthen the whole-of-government approach to implementing the original National Quantum Initiative Act by expanding the authorized core agencies and providing new dedicated international funding to follow-up on U.S. commitments to international cooperation.

3. Strengthen the whole-of-government approach to implementing the original National Quantum Initiative Act by expanding the authorized core agencies and providing new dedicated international funding to follow-up on U.S. commitments to international cooperation.

interaction_phrase: Translate discoveries in quantum information science to commercial utility
occurrence_sentence: 4. Translate discoveries in quantum information science to commercial utility and agency missions through lab-to-market engineering, systems integration programs, and public-private partnerships.

interaction_phrase: Translate discoveries in quantum information science to commercial utility
occurrence_sentence: 4. Translate discoveries in quantum information science to commercial utility and agency missions through lab-to-market engineering, systems integration programs, and public-private partnerships.

interaction_phrase: to remain competitive with world-wide investments and to recruit and retain the best talent
occurrence_sentence: High-quality research capital is essential for the United States to remain competitive with world-wide investments and to recruit and retain the best talent.

interaction_phrase: the DOE Quantum Network Infrastructure Research Program
occurrence_sentence: Other opportunities include those previously authorized in the CHIPS and Science Act, such as the DOE Quantum Network Infrastructure Research Program and the Quantum User Expansion for Science and Technology program (QUEST).

interaction_phrase: the birth of a multilateral quantum dialogue; it began with a series of discussions two years ago that we nicknamed the [2^N group]
occurrence_sentence: Let me elaborate on the notion of a quantum international fund. This past year also marked the birth of a multilateral quantum dialogue; it began with a series of discussions two years ago that we nicknamed the [2^N group](https://www.quantum.gov/readout-international-roundtable-2n/).

interaction_phrase: my home lab, the Laboratory for Physical Sciences (LPS), has just funded the investigators leading the Q-12
occurrence_sentence: I am pleased that my home lab, the Laboratory for Physical Sciences (LPS), has just funded the investigators leading the Q-12 to expand and broaden the Quantum Profiles toward that original vision, including interviews with those like me who chose to go into government.
